title: Nyra 16x
description: a clean, minimal texture pack for both PvP and survival
body:
## ✦ Nyra 16x 

clean and minimal texture pack for both competitive PvP and survival. 

## ✦ Pack Features

- **Short Swords – Short, clean blades for better visibility in PvP.**
- **Shader Friendly – Works great with most shaders as long as they don't override base textures.**
- **PvP Optimized – Built for competitive play. Low lag and smooth.**
- **Lightweight – Minimal textures, better FPS.**
- **Era GUI – Currently using Era GUI. A custom one made by me is on the way.**
- **Minecraft 26.1 – That's the supported version for now. older versions are coming soon.**
   
## ✦ FAQ

###  Can I use shaders with it?
- Yes! Just stick to shaders that don't override or mess with the base textures.

###  Can I showcase it on YouTube or streams?
-  Of course! Just make sure to credit the listed below.

## ✦ Credits
- [**ItsFlare**](https://www.youtube.com/@h4mdyk) – Main items design
- **Looshy 16x** – Base reference pack, foods (temporary)
- **Era GUI** – GUI (temporary, custom GUI by me coming soon)
- **Hippopotamoss** - Beds from Pastel beds
